svg.text: Real-world reflectance is too complex for analytic formulas or lookup tables

g.text: Problem 1: Analytic models are too simple
Problem 2: Storing it in a table doesn't scale
BRDF is 4D — storage grows as N⁴

svg.text: A tiny MLP learns what years of manual BRDF engineering could not capture
